commands.review_summary:
Routes native Anthropic and Gemini PDF provider POSTs through OpenClaw's guarded provider HTTP helpers and adds focused regression coverage for private-network blocking, opt-in, and bounded JSON reads.

PR surface: Source +68, Tests +39. Total +107 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level review: current main directly fetches native PDF provider URLs and directly calls `res.json()` on success, while the branch adds guards and tests for that path. I did not run a live provider or local real-provider reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR has a protected label, mock-only proof, and a deliberate provider security/compatibility behavior change, so the remaining action is maintainer risk acceptance and contributor proof rather than an automated repair.

target.title: fix(pdf): guard native provider requests
target.body:
## Summary

Route native Anthropic/Gemini PDF provider requests through OpenClaw's shared guarded provider HTTP path.

Related: NVIDIA-dev/openclaw-tracking#786

## Changes

- Use `resolveProviderHttpRequestConfig` and `postJsonRequest` for native PDF provider POSTs.
- Thread resolved model headers and provider request transport metadata from the PDF tool into native PDF helpers.
- Replace successful provider `res.json()` parsing with bounded `readProviderJsonResponse` parsing.
- Add focused regressions for private-network blocking, explicit `allowPrivateNetwork` opt-in, and oversized successful JSON responses.

## Validation

- `corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm format:check -- src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm tsgo:core`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --parallel-tests "node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.test.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.test.ts"` clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Notes

- AI-assisted.
- No `CHANGELOG.md` update.
- `corepack pnpm check:changed -- src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-tool.ts src/agents/tools/pdf-native-providers.test.ts` did not run checks because the delegated Blacksmith Testbox path failed at local `crabbox` binary sanity checks before executing the lane.
target.author: eleqtrizit

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
